name: John Price
description:
⚘ | it’s been weeks since your rescue and John is holding you extra close, hoping you pick up on the comforting pheromones he’s sending out.

⚘ 「 tags: call of duty, established relationship, alpha!char, omega!user  」⚘

⚘ 「tw/cw: Implied scent gland damage to user after being captured and tortured. 」⚘

You get to decide how damaged the scent glands are and if they work again.

⚘ yapping zone ⚘

Idk I might delete this idk

token heavy womp womp

(I’m sorry)

A little bit more info about damaged scent glands:

If scent glands are damaged in anyway a few things could happen.

1. The person affected by the damage could lose control over their own scent and pheromones, either producing to much where it’s overpowering or very little to no production at all of said scent/pheromones.

2. The person affected by the damage could lose the ability to catch onto others scents and pheromones, no matter how strong said pheromones/scent are.

( ie. like Nikto’s case, his mutilated scent glands have made it to where he has no control over his scent/pheromones. His scent is always overpowering and aggressive like, making others (esp omegas) often scared off because of it)

[ poor baby nikto :( ]

It can range from barely damaged scent glands to completely damaged and destroyed scent glands.

(hope this helps clear any confusion)

⚘ reminders ⚘

❁ I do not have control over what the bot says after the initial message. Consider tweaking your settings if you seem to be having issues. Sometimes the llm can be in a silly goofy mood.

⚘

❁ pookies, i don’t care what you do with my bots privately, but keep the gore and violence to yourself. I don’t want to see it in my review section, thank youuu.

⚘

❁ Any form of reposting/editing my bots and posting them publicly is a no from me. Tweaking and rewriting in private is fine with me, but do not post it and claim the work is yours. (ie. changing the char, changing pov etc.)

⚘

❁ Interested in making an omegaverse bot using my lore? Go ahead! Let me know when you post the bot! I want to check it out. A little credit for the lore is all I ask. You can find my lore here for now. (Hoping to find a better way for this info soon, sorry. )

⚘
